voice: The tone is warm, gracious, and quietly precise, reflecting a bride who knows exactly what she wants for her special day. It balances traditional elegance with a personal, heartfelt touch.
logo_style_brief: There is no formal logo; instead, the brand identity relies on elegant typographic lockups. These will combine romantic hand-script elements with a clean, classic serif typeface for a sophisticated yet personal feel.
photo_style_tokens: romantic editorial wedding florals, soft natural daylight, blush-and-sage garden palette, fine-art film feel, gentle grain

facts_from_brief.Signature drinks sign: signature drinks image I created and would like to keep that sign as is
facts_from_brief.Existing sign issues: other signs do not coordinate well with it, and they are not high enough resolution for professional print quality
facts_from_brief.Backgrounds origin: current backgrounds were AI-generated, which limits the DPI and makes them risky for large-format printing
facts_from_brief.Project goal: I’m looking to create a cohesive new family of signs in print-ready resolution
facts_from_brief.Sign types to redesign: attached seating chart and welcome sign drafts show the general sign types that need to be redesigned
facts_from_brief.Creative direction option 1: Continue with the soft floral theme. The flowers should be inspired by this arrangement: https://bifloralsilkflowers.com/producto/emma/arch-arrangement-6/
facts_from_brief.Creative direction option 2: Use a more elevated black script direction, similar to the attached example.jpg.
facts_from_brief.Design coordination requirement: signs to feel like a coordinated family, while allowing the signature drinks sign to remain the more playful, personal piece
facts_from_brief.Welcome Gathering Sign specs: Size: 20 in x 30 in Minimum resolution at 300 DPI: 6000 x 9000 pixels
facts_from_brief.Welcome Wedding Ceremony & Reception Sig: Size: 35.4 in x 23.6 in Minimum resolution at 300 DPI: 10,620 x 7,080 pixels
facts_from_brief.Menu / Thank You Long Card specs: 4 in × 9 in, portrait orientation, with 0.125 in bleed on all sides. Minimum export resolution should be 1200 × 2700 pixels at final trim size,
facts_from_brief.Seating Chart specs: Size: 47.2 in x 35.4 in Minimum resolution at 300 DPI:

invented: Client is a wedding couple: Maren & Elliot Hartwell
Venue: Willowmere Estate, a restored manor house and gardens in the fictional town of Cedar Hollow
Couple's pets: Barnaby (golden retriever) and Clementine (orange tabby cat) for signature drink names
